name: Sour Cream Lemon Pie#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar and cornstarch in a bowl.
2. Add the lemon juice, margarine, and milk to the mixture.
3. In a small bowl, beat the 3 egg yolks.
4. Stir some of the hot mixture from the pan into the egg yolks.
5. Mix well and add all to the pan.
6. Cook until thick on low heat, then remove from heat.
7. Add the sour cream and stir gently.
8. Pour the mixture into a graham cracker crust.
9. Refrigerate overnight or for several hours.
10. Spread Cool Whip over the top before serving.
